problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
